{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the output of the following code: class Animal { void sound() { System.out.println(\"Animal makes a sound\"); } } class Dog extends Animal { void sound() { System.out.println(\"Dog barks\"); } } }",
      "options": [
        "A) Animal makes a sound",
        "B) Dog barks",
        "C) Compiler Error",
        "D) No Output"
      ],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "The output will be 'Dog barks' because the overridden method in the
